11.title: 10th SPECIAL ITEM
text:
To celebrate our 10th anniversary and CI renewal,
we created a lively collection of festival-inspired items
under the theme “Million Volt Ennichi.”
They will be given away through a lottery,
so be sure to check out the details.

12.title: ENDING MESSAGE
text:
In May 2026,
FunTech will celebrate its 10th anniversary.
When we started,
we were almost a student-led company.
None of us came from
major advertising agencies or fine art universities.
Yet we were able to grow,through sheer effort,
into the creative company we are proud of today.
This was only possible
thanks to the trust and support
of our clients and partners
who chose to work with us.
We are deeply grateful.
Thank you.

Over the next decade,
we will step into a broader field:
creative branding,
on a larger stage than ever before.
As the starting point of that challenge,
we renewed our own CI.
If this renewal helps you
sense our strength
in designing craft and language
powered by technology,
then it is a perfect score for us.

We will continue to fully explore
every emerging technology
of the moment
and relentlessly pursue creativity
that sends a jolt of electricity
through you.
Please look forward
to what’s next.
And we sincerely appreciate
your continued support.

02.title: BRAND MESSAGE
text:
We enjoy creativity as a team.
We share the journey with our clients.
We chase “ROMAN”, together.
Ten years behind us.
A new decade to evolve.

04.title: VISION VISUAL
text:
Each individual shines in their own way,
coming together to create overwhelming, electrifying creativity
that sends a jolt straight to the heart.
Our CI expresses FunTech as a playful container
where our Superstar-Creators gather, collide, and spark.

05.title: FUNTECH WAY
text:
A shared language
for the next 10 years

To guide our next decade,
we defined a core set of shared values
that will shape how FunTech
thinks, creates, and moves forward.

06.title: A MILLION-VOLT CREATIVE
text:
A powerful Creativity
as if you get an electric shock to the heart.
By riding the accelerating evolution of technology,
we continue to break through moments of “creative saturation”
and deliver million-volt-level craftsmanship to the world.

07.title: BREAKERS OF VICTORY
text:
Not only through craft, but through strategy.
We build brands that break through our clients’ barriers,
creating sources of energy that drive victory and transformation.
We stand beside our clients as "Breakers" who initiate change.

08.title: ALL FOR FUN
text:
We fully enjoy technology and take joy in craftsmanship.
That spirit of fun overflows into our creative work,
sets users’ hearts in motion, and crosses borders around the world.
For us, enjoyment is everything.

09.title: LOGO DETAILS
text:
We are a collective of star creators who shine with
originality.
The stars woven into the “U” and “C” continue to
illuminate the kind of organization FunTech strives to
be.

Boyish in impulse, street in style. A playful,
boundary-breaking spirit in a cartoon-inspired look
with charm and a hint of edge. Unbound by
convention, it goes all in on playing with creativity.

Its ever-shifting form is a style built to play boldly
through an unpredictable era.
No matter how technology or the environment
changes, we ride those waves with a sense of play.
